Title: Microsoft Windows Explorer AutoPlay Not Disabled
Solution:
Disable autoplay from any disk type by setting the value NoDriveTypeAutoRun to 255 under this registry key: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer(Disable autoplay from any disk type by setting the value NoDriveTypeAutoRun to 255 under this registry key:

HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer)

Title: Windows Explorer Autoplay Not Disabled for Default User
Solution:
Make sure that the value NoDriveTypeAutoRun is defined under this registry key: HKU\DEFAULT\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer(Make sure that the value NoDriveTypeAutoRun is defined under this registry key:

HKU\DEFAULT\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer)
Results:
%windir%\explorer.exe   found 
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer NoAutorun is missing. 
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer NoDriveTypeAutoRun is missing. 
HKU\.DEFAULT\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer NoDriveTypeAutoRun is missing.
